title: jelly pack
description: pack with some essential client mods for jelly and friends :)
body:
# jelly pack

some optimization and quality of life mods for me and some of my friends. includes basics like sodium and lithium as well as some technical qol like masa's client mods. check the bottom for important notes!

### mods:
  - bobby
  - c2me
  - capes
  - carpet
  - continuity
  - e4mc
  - ears
  - entityculling
  - iris
  - itemscroller
  - litematica
  - lithium
  - minihud
  - model gap fix
  - modmenu
  - morechathistory
  - ok zoomer
  - sodium
  - tweakeroo
  - yosbr

 ### resources/shaders:
  - pride pack
  - mellow
  - complementary reimagined
  - super duper vanilla
  - glacial indifference
  - roboto bold
  - vanilla tweaks

as new versions come out it may take time for mods to be brought up to date. apologies if the list is inaccurate for your version!

*the pack also contains a few vanilla-ish resource packs as well as my litematica schems and* ***notably*** *has my many options and keybinds contained within yosbr, including a number of tweakeroo toggles that can get locked 'on' by accident;* ***if you don't have options of your own and you don't like mine, delete the yosbr folder (***`\instances\JellyPack-1.xx.x-x.x.x\.minecraft\config\yosbr`***).***


additionally, if you would like the pack to auto-update, drop [packwiz-installer-bootstrap.jar](https://github.com/packwiz/packwiz-installer-bootstrap/releases) in your .minecraft folder (where options.txt is), then add `"$INST_JAVA" -jar packwiz-installer-bootstrap.jar https://dj-enby.github.io/JellyPack_1.xx.x/pack.toml` to your prelaunch options, replacing 1.xx.x for your version of Minecraft.

(*if you have any problems or just want to chat, feel free to [join the discord!](https://discord.gg/huyH6Kk)* 😄)

### **thanks for checking it out!!**  
  




  
###### *btw the slime block is the official icon of this modpack so u betta use that on your launcher!!!*
